channel.title: Ofertas Diarias de Audio Plugin Guy (2026-05-10)
channel.description: Resumen de las mejores ofertas y freebies del d?a 2026-05-10.

item.title: [HOT] Solid State Logic|Solid State Logic is offering 69% off on LMC+ compressor plugin for Win & Mac.?NEW
item.description: Descuento: 69% - Desarrollador: Solid State Logic - Finaliza: 2026-05-14

item.title: [HOT] Acustica Audio|Acustica Audio Color Week – up to 75% off on selected plugins.?ENDSSOON!?NEW

[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] Sync Audio|Sync Audio is offering MegaMod, a plugin to modulate any plugin, as a free download only this weekend. Available for Win & Mac. Use the coupon code: PRODUCTIONEXPERT.?ENDSSOON!?NEW
[FREEBIE] [SAVE BIG] [HOT] Goodhertz|Goodhertz has released LA-210, a free compressor/clipper plugin (beta) for Mac & Win.?NEW
[HOT] IK Multimedia|IK Multimedia 30th Anniversary Deals – 66% off on Brown Sound Bundle, including all 3 Brown Sound TONEX Signature Collections.?NEW
